title: ESPY’s 2nd Annual Youth Mental Health & Wellness Conference
description: Our ESPY team is bringing together passionate changemakers for a powerful day dedicated to youth mental health and wellness! We’re looking forward to welcoming clinicians, educators, advocates, youth serving professionals, and community members to ESPY’s 2nd Annual Youth Mental Health & Wellness Conference. Save your spot today and scan the QR code to register now! […]

title: Innovation Stations: Python Coding 101
venue: Queens Public Library at Jackson Heights
description: Python Coding 101 is a beginner-friendly workshop designed to introduce teens to the exciting world of programming using the versatile and widely-used Python language. Led by ArrayScape, this hands-on session will break down the basics of coding in an approachable, engaging way, perfect for those with little to no prior experience. Participants will explore core […]

title: Historias in Motion: Dome Cartographies Monument Launch
description: Join us for the launch of “Dome Cartographies” by artist Natalia Nakazawa at Jackson Heights! The Clemente Soto Vélez Cultural and Educational Center and Kinfolk Tech are excited to announce the Jackson Heights, Queens edition ofHistorias in Motion, featuring “Dome Cartographies,” a new AR monument by artist Natalia Nakazawa paired with historical contributions from the […]

title: Friday Wine Tasting
description: Stop by between 5pm and 8pm. Let us introduce you to wines worth talking about.

title: Film Fatales NYC Artist Connection
description: A cocktail gathering for all filmmakers and film lovers! Join Film Fatales members for an in-person cocktail gathering in New York to prepare for some good vibes as we head into summer. Where better to celebrate cinema than at the Museum of the Moving Image? This year we are extending an invitation to our extended […]

title: Clases de tejido / Crochet Classes
description: Ven a relajarte con nosotros mientras aprendes a tejer. Esta clase es para todos los niveles, materiales incluidos. Actividad 100% familiar. Todos son bienvenidos!! Come relax with us while you learn to knit. This class is for all levels, materials included. 100% family activity. Everyone is welcome!! Run by 34th Avenue Open Streets Coalition

title: Baile Folklórico
description: Join us for our beginner baile folklórico classes. All ages welcome. Run by 34th Avenue Open Streets Coalition

title: Fran Vielma Pan-American Jazz Orchestra / (First Set)
description: The Fran Vielma Pan-American Jazz Orchestra blends contemporary jazz of the Americas and the Caribbean, led by Venezuelan composer and percussionist Fran Vielma. 7:00 pm. to 8:00 pm (First Set) 9:00 pm. to 10:00 pm (Second Set) Featuring: Trumpets: Sam Hoyt; Gaston Kaisin; Alejandro Berti; Stuart Mack Trombones: Matt McDonald; Tim Vaughn; Alex Asher; Jeff […]

title: Poncia

title: Music Show: Love’s Crossing
description: We’re Love’s Crossing, a musical journey that started with two people, one shared passion, and endless possibilities. Our music is where classical training meets contemporary spirit, creating something uniquely our own. From intimate venues to festival stages, we’re on a mission to share our love for music and create moments that resonate. Join us as […]

title: Live Music with Moneco
address: 80-02 Northern Blvd, Jackson Heights, NY 11372, USA
description: We are super excited to welcome Moneco, a local band who will be playing psychedelic Peruvian chicha! You should definitely not miss this, you’ll be up and dancing and enjoying some incredible, unique music from these guys.

title: Brown Noise Comedy
description: Brown Noise Comedy is a touring comedy show featuring the best brown comedians in America. We bring together desi, South Asian, Arab, and Persian comics for nights of comedy that feel like home.
